nasb.text: The nakedness of your sister, either your father’s daughter or your mother’s daughter, whether born at home or born outside, their nakedness you shall not uncover.

esv.text: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your sister, your father’s daughter or your mother’s daughter, whether brought up in the family or in another home.

cnv.text: 你姊妹的下體，無論是異母同父的，或是異父同母的，是在家裡生的，或是在外面生的，你都不可揭露她們的下體。

ccb.text: 不可与你的姊妹乱伦。不论是同父异母的，还是同母异父的，成长在同一家庭，还是不同家庭，都不可与她乱伦。
